title: Gili Trawangan Escape
summary: A longer blue-water escape for guests seeking a more adventurous private yacht route.
description: An extended yacht journey for island-hopping energy, clear water, and a more exclusive offshore feel. Perfect for guests who want to go beyond Bali's coast and experience the famous Gili Islands.
imageAlt: Private yacht anchored at Gili Trawangan with crystal clear waters
highlights: Crossing to Gili Islands for a full day adventure
Snorkeling at Gili's famous coral gardens
Beach bar stop at Gili Trawangan
Island-hopping between Gili Air, Meno, and Trawangan
Fresh seafood lunch on the island
tips: Best season is April-October for calm seas
Book at least 2 weeks in advance for this route
seoTitle: Gili Trawangan Yacht Charter from Bali | Marelune Bali
seoDescription: Book a private yacht to Gili Trawangan from Bali. Full-day island escape with snorkeling, beach stops, and crystal clear waters. Custom charter experience.
